text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nn‚Ä¶ I'm sorry, I was in a‚Ä¶ meeting. 
An intellectual evil‚Ä¶ kind of situation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes‚Ä¶ Last night, the beverage that 
Bakushins one's thoughts‚Ä¶ 
Coffee, I drank too much of it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
"Stay sharp, keep that drowsiness away!" 
the label said‚Ä¶ but I didn't expect it to go 
this far‚Ä¶

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
YaaaawnÔΩû‚Ä¶ 
Trainer, please do be careful around coffee.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Only one cup, and it has this effect‚Ä¶ 
‚Ä¶I'll‚Ä¶ only get through half of the day today.

Perhaps because of her overly straight- 
laced nature, Sakura Bakushin O was unable 
to sleep well after just one cup of coffee‚Ä¶
